data.title: Why Dave & Buster's Entertainment Stock Is Tumbling Wednesday
data.description: Dave & Buster's Entertainment Inc (NASDAQ:PLAY) shares are trading lower Wednesday after the company reported worse-than-expected financial results for the third quarter and announced a CEO transition. Multiple analysts downgraded the stock following the print.
